title:
A TABLE OF THE EPISTLES AND GOSPELS, AFTER THE ROMAN USE, UPON SUNDAYS, HOLIDAYS,
and other Feasts, and special days and causes through the whole year, for such as are desirous to read them according to this translation. And therefore the Epistles taken out of the old Testament are omitted, till the edition thereof.
marginal_note: At what verse the Epistles and Gospels begin is set down in the marginal notes.
